name: KrillApp.Project
title: Project
description: A container node that organizes project-related artifacts such as diagrams, task lists, and journals. Provides a logical grouping for documentation, visualization, and task management within Krill. Does not perform any runtime processing — serves purely as an organizational container.
shortDescription: Container for organizing project diagrams, task lists, and journals.
llmPurpose: Organizes project-related artifacts (diagrams, task lists, journals) as a structural container.
llmCreationHints: Create a Project when the user wants to organize diagrams, task lists, or journals under a named group.

llmConnectionHints.role: top-level organizational container for project artifacts

llmExamples: Create a new project for my greenhouse monitoring.
Organize these nodes into a project.
Add a project to hold my diagrams and task lists.
